title: Machaziy'owth #4238
definition:
Mahazioth = "visions"

 1) one of the 14 sons of Heman the Kohathite and the chief of a group
    of singers
nasbUsage:
Definition: Mahazioth = "visions"

 1) one of the 14 sons of Heman the Kohathite and the chief of a group
    of singers

    NASB:  visions, an Isr.
